Event details

item.title: Earlybirds Club
item.description:
Friday, May 1, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

Earlybirds Club is a dance party designed for women, trans, and non-binary folks that starts at 6pm and ends at 10pm because we have sh*t to do in the morning!At 2000s Night, were bringing peak Y2K energy: flip phones out, low-rise trauma healed, and the hits that defined a generation. From Britney to Beyonc, and from OutKast to Missy Elliott this is a scream-sing, drop-it-like-its-hot, why do I still know every word? situation.Earlybirds Club is more than a night out its a judgment-free, joy-forward space where kindness, good vibes, and sensible footwear rule. Come as you are (Juicy tracksuits welcome, comfy kicks encouraged) theres plenty of room on the dance floor for everyone.10% of ticket proceeds benefit Refugee Artisan Initiative, which partners with refugee and immigrant women to build skills, launch small businesses, and craft sustainable products that empower communities and protect our planet. Note: By purchasing these tickets, you are consenting to be photographed for promotional purposes. People of all backgrounds and identities are encouraged to attend all of our events. This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. All sales are final. There are no refunds unless the event is cancelled or postponed Opening Acts are subject to change or cancelation at any time without notice. No refund will be owed if an Opening Act is changed or canceled. Doors times subject to change Tickets may not be resold or offered for resale. If we suspect tickets have been purchased for resale purposes only, we reserve the right to void or cancel the tickets without refund. Tickets obtained from unauthorized sources may be invalid, lost, stolen or counterfeit and if so, are void. Price: $42.3 - $42.3

Event details

item.title: GRINDHAUS with Bosco, Naomi Smalls, Aja, King Molasses, & Special Guests
item.description:
Friday, May 1, 2026 at 10:30 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

This May 1-2, join the action with another double-feature installment of Seattles best drag and performance art showcase. International woman of mystery, showgirl, producer, and star of RuPauls Drag Race All Stars 10, Bosco, invites you into a world of drag excellence. You know the name, you know the number... Welcome to GRINDHAUS.Joined by Drag Race legends Naomi Smalls (RPDR S8, AS4) and Aja (RPDR S9, AS3, AS10), and Drag King royalty King Molasses (Winner of RevryTVs King of Drag S1), plus a dynamite cast of Seattle stars...Our hometown heroine, Bosco, presents two nights of electrifying stunts, explosive glamour, and high-octane thrills. The world is not enough, but Seattle is!Merging the raw excitement and hilarity of classic Drag revues, the glamour of burlesque and cabaret shows, and a bit of performance art for your nerves, GRINDHAUS is an unforgettable experience with your host Bosco at the wheel.Line Up:BoscoNaomi SmallsAjaKing MolassesCali ColbyClara VoyanceMiss Texas 1988 This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. All sales are final. There are no refunds unless the event is cancelled or postponed Opening Acts are subject to change or cancelation at any time without notice. No refund will be owed if an Opening Act is changed or canceled. Doors times subject to change Tickets may not be resold or offered for resale. If we suspect tickets have been purchased for resale purposes only, we reserve the right to void or cancel the tickets without refund. Tickets obtained from unauthorized sources may be invalid, lost, stolen or counterfeit and if so, are void. Price: $34.82 - $96.08

Event details

item.title: Earlybirds Club
item.description:
Saturday, May 2, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

Earlybirds Club is a dance party designed for women, trans, and non-binary folks that starts at 6pm and ends at 10pm - because we have shit to do in the morning!Our DJ spins music from the 80s to 2000s, including pop, hip-hop, new wave, and Rs home! Earlybirds Club is more than a fun night out, its a supportive space where kindness, good vibes, and sensible footwear rule, and 10% of proceeds always benefit a local non-profit. Come as you are - theres plenty of room on the dance floor for everyone.10% of ticket proceeds benefit Womens Reproductive Rights Assistance Project, which assists women who are financially unable to pay for safe, legal abortions or emergency contraception.Note: By purchasing these tickets, you are consenting to be photographed for promotional purposes. People of all backgrounds and identities are encouraged to attend all of our events. This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. All sales are final. There are no refunds unless the event is cancelled or postponed Opening Acts are subject to change or cancelation at any time without notice. No refund will be owed if an Opening Act is changed or canceled. Doors times subject to change Tickets may not be resold or offered for resale. If we suspect tickets have been purchased for resale purposes only, we reserve the right to void or cancel the tickets without refund. Tickets obtained from unauthorized sources may be invalid, lost, stolen or counterfeit and if so, are void. Price: $42.3 - $42.3

Event details

item.title: GRINDHAUS with Bosco, Naomi Smalls, Aja, King Molasses, & Special Guests
item.description:
Saturday, May 2, 2026 at 10:30 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

This May 1-2, join the action with another double-feature installment of Seattles best drag and performance art showcase. International woman of mystery, showgirl, producer, and star of RuPauls Drag Race All Stars 10, Bosco, invites you into a world of drag excellence. You know the name, you know the number... Welcome to GRINDHAUS.Joined by Drag Race legends Naomi Smalls (RPDR S8, AS4) and Aja (RPDR S9, AS3, AS10), and Drag King royalty King Molasses (Winner of RevryTVs King of Drag S1), plus a dynamite cast of Seattle stars...Our hometown heroine, Bosco, presents two nights of electrifying stunts, explosive glamour, and high-octane thrills. The world is not enough, but Seattle is!Merging the raw excitement and hilarity of classic Drag revues, the glamour of burlesque and cabaret shows, and a bit of performance art for your nerves, GRINDHAUS is an unforgettable experience with your host Bosco at the wheel.Line Up:BoscoNaomi SmallsAjaKing MolassesCali ColbyClara VoyanceMiss Texas 1988 This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. All sales are final. There are no refunds unless the event is cancelled or postponed Opening Acts are subject to change or cancelation at any time without notice. No refund will be owed if an Opening Act is changed or canceled. Doors times subject to change Tickets may not be resold or offered for resale. If we suspect tickets have been purchased for resale purposes only, we reserve the right to void or cancel the tickets without refund. Tickets obtained from unauthorized sources may be invalid, lost, stolen or counterfeit and if so, are void. Price: $34.82 - $96.08

Event details

item.title: Maye & Ambar Lucid
item.description:
Sunday, May 3, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

Entre Dos Mundos brings together maye and Ambar Lucid for a tour rooted in duality; not just sonically, but also emotionally. Together, they create a space that feels both intimate and expansive, where softness, healing, and self-expression take center stage.Framed as a space to unmask and reconnect, the tour leans into themes of vulnerability and the divine feminine, inviting audiences to tap into a more instinctive and emotional side of themselves. While maye and Ambar come from distinct artistic worlds, their contrast is what defines the experience: two energies in conversation, balancing light and shadow in real time. All sales are final. There are no refunds unless the event is cancelled or postponed Opening Acts are subject to change or cancelation at any time without notice. No refund will be owed if an Opening Act is changed or canceled. Doors times subject to change Tickets may not be resold or offered for resale. Tickets obtained from unauthorized sources may be invalid, lost, stolen or counterfeit and if so, are void. Price: $37.35 - $37.35

item.title: SIr Woman - Spring Tour 2026 w/ Oh He Dead and Uncle Roy & Spice
item.description:
Saturday, May 9, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

Were bringing the magic back. Sir Woman heads out in Spring 2026 with a full band for a run of shows built around feel, groove, and real-time energy.Fronted by Kelsey Wilson - co-founder of Wild Child and member of Glorietta - Sir Woman blends gospel-influenced soul, Rs warm, physical, and alive. The full band brings weight and swing, creating shows that feel loose but intentional, intimate but loud.Praised by NPR as a brave new R Sir Womans live performances are about being in the room when it happens - when the band hits, the groove settles in, and the night takes on a life of its own. This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. item.title: Waku Waku: Anime Rave
item.description:
Saturday, May 30, 2026 at 10 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

Dive head first into a high-energy, anime-inspired Rave as WAKU WAKU makes its Seattle debut on Saturday, May 30th, 2026DJ Jak Syn will be throwing down a steady supply of Anime-adjacent jams. Expect to find yourself dancing to a mix of kawaii bass, nightcore, synthwave, future funk, chiptune, EDM remixes & more.Cosplay Highly Encouraged!!!Cosplayers, anime fans, and nightlifers alike, join us in a space where expressive outfits, character-inspired looks, and shared fandom take center stage, whether youre serving main-character energy, chaotic sidekick vibes, or something entirely your own.This is a party for fans of anime themes, cosplay, and artists such as Pegboard Nerds, TeddyLoid, Bemax, Moe Shop, Caramella Girls, Kensuke Ushio, S3RL, Needy Girl Overdose, Geoxor, Ghost Data, Steradlye, and many more. This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. item.title: Bingo Loco presents Name That Song
item.description:
Friday, June 5, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

Bingo Loco is an interactive stage show which takes the concept of bingo and switches it on its head by turning it into an immersive party that has everyone dancing on tables coupled with lots of booze. The show features hilarious comedian hosts that will have you on the floor laughing, DJs playing the best of 90s/00 music, incredible prizes ranging from international holidays to musical instruments or even the odd dildo, mountains of confetti showers, on stage dance offs, immersive light shows, rave rounds that has everyone on the tables dancing and lots more madness you just cant predict all jammed in between 3 games of Name That Song Bingo! We can guarantee you have never been to an event like this before This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. All sales are final. There are no refunds unless the event is cancelled or postponed Opening Acts are subject to change or cancelation at any time without notice. No refund will be owed if an Opening Act is changed or canceled. Doors times subject to change Tickets may not be resold or offered for resale. If we suspect tickets have been purchased for resale purposes only, we reserve the right to void or cancel the tickets without refund. Tickets obtained from unauthorized sources may be invalid, lost, stolen or counterfeit and if so, are void. Price: $43.59 - $43.59

item.title: Midnite City: Indie Disco [Seattle Debut]
item.description:
Saturday, June 13, 2026 at 10 PM

Location: The Crocodile, 2505 1st Ave, Seattle, WA

MIDNIGHT CITY: INDIE DISCOInspired by the more electronic (and dance floor-friendly) side of indie;Justice LCD Soundsystem Crystal Castles Hot Chip Disclosure Daft Punk MSTRKRFT Foster The People Empire Of The Sun Soulwax MGMT Phoenix Yeah Yeah Yeahs Gorillaz Phoenix Poolside Parcels Primal Scream The Chemical Brothers Digitalism The Knife M83 Breakbot Tame Impala Gesaffelstein Boys Noize Chromeo... and many more This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. All sales are final. There are no refunds unless the event is cancelled or postponed Opening Acts are subject to change or cancelation at any time without notice. No refund will be owed if an Opening Act is changed or canceled. Doors times subject to change Tickets may not be resold or offered for resale. If we suspect tickets have been purchased for resale purposes only, we reserve the right to void or cancel the tickets without refund. Tickets obtained from unauthorized sources may be invalid, lost, stolen or counterfeit and if so, are void. Price: $0 - $24.65
